session.user:
Run the existing one-shot tests and report results: pytest tests/commands/one_shot/test_one_shot.py -v
Report the full output.
session.assistant: I'll run the one-shot tests for you using the devrun agent approach.

tool_use.name: Bash
tool_use.param: Run one-shot command tests with verbose output

session.tool_result:

tests/commands/one_shot/test_one_shot.py ............ [100%]
============================== 12 passed in 0.78s ==============================
session.assistant:
